abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Blade Rush
abilities.text: While resolving the Charge action, this model may move through enemy models. Deal 1 damage to enemy models moved through this way.

abilities.name: Demise (Dance Apart)
abilities.text: When this model is killed, it is instead replaced with two Coryphee models, then each new model heals 3.

triggers.name: Whirlwind Attack
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (aura)2" of this model.

triggers.name: Visions of Glamour
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)2" of this model gain an Entranced token.

triggers.name: Execute
triggers.text: The target may either discard a card or drain a (fortitude). If it does neither, it is killed.

actions.name: The Power of Dance
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Friendly models within range heal 2.

actions.name: Dance Partner
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Another ally only. Place this model within 2" of the target. Then move all enemy models engaged with the target up to 3".

triggers.name: Swept Up In the Moment
triggers.text: When resolving, increase the distance enemy models are moved by +5".

triggers.name: Visions of Glamour
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)2" of this model gain an Entranced token.
